news.headline: Former assistant U.S. trade representative predicts a Donald Trump presidency would further distance U.S. from global trade deals.
news.summary: According to a former assistant U.S. trade representative, a presidency under Donald Trump would expedite a move away from the long-standing free trade agreement that the U.S. has upheld for decades.

news.headline: Abcourt Mines Inc. reports Q4 and annual results for the year ended June 30, 2024 in Canadian dollars. Stock symbol: ABI (TSX Venture) and ABMBF (OTCQB).
news.summary: Abcourt Mines Inc. has released its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending June 30, 2024. The Corporation, trading on TSX Venture under ABI and OTCQB as ABMBF, announced its figures in Canadian dollars, unless specified. Interested parties can access the financial statements and management report on SEDAR.

news.headline: Brandywine Realty Trust (BDN) announces Q3 2024 results and narrows 2024 guidance in Philadelphia.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on October 22, 2024, Brandywine Realty Trust released its financial and operating results for the three and nine-month periods concluding on September 30, 2024. The company, listed under NYSE as BDN, provided an overview of its performance during this time frame.

news.headline: Enterprise Bancorp, Inc. reported Q3 2024 net income of $10.0 million, up from $9.5 million in Q2 2024, and $9.7 million in Q3 2023.
news.summary: Enterprise Bancorp, Inc., the parent company of Enterprise Bank based in Lowell, Mass., released its financial results for the quarter ending September 30, 2024. The net income for this period was $10.0 million, translating to $0.80 per diluted common share. This marks an increase from the previous quarter's net income of $9.5 million ($0.77 per diluted common share) and slightly higher than the net income of $9.7 million ($0.79 per diluted common share) from the same quarter in 2023.

news.headline: BetOnline.ag sees record-breaking political bets for 2024 election with more money expected than Super Bowl.
news.summary: In the upcoming 2024 Election, it is projected that a larger sum of money will be bet on the event compared to the Super Bowl. Over the past ten years, there has been a significant rise in the popularity of betting on political results, specifically in U.S. elections. BetOnline.ag has emerged as a key player in facilitating this trend. Stay tuned for more updates on the escalating betting figures for the 2024 Election.

news.headline: Perseus Mining's strong performance in Q3 2024 led to a US$643 million cash & bullion balance.
news.summary: In Perth on October 23, 2024, Perseus Mining announced their consistent delivery of robust production, cash flow, and growth. This success has led to a substantial cash and bullion balance of $643 million for the company.

news.headline: Goldman Sachs honors Intersect Power CEO Sheldon Kimber for Climate Entrepreneurship in 2024.
news.summary: In Oakland, California, Sheldon Kimber, the CEO and Founder of Intersect Power, was honored by Goldman Sachs as one of the top entrepreneurs of 2024.

news.headline: Century Next Financial Corp. with $857.7M in assets reported 3rd quarter 2024 results in Ruston, La.
news.summary: In Ruston, Louisiana, on October 22, 2024, Century Next Financial Corporation (OTCQX: CTUY), the parent company of Century Next Bank, disclosed its financial performance for the third quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. The company reported holding assets worth $857.7 million.

news.headline: SAG Holdings IPO on NASDAQ at $8/shares raises $7 million with 875,000 shares offered.
news.summary: Singapore-based company SAG Holdings Limited, listed on Nasdaq under the symbol SAG, disclosed the pricing details of its initial public offering on October 22, 2024. The company offered 875,000 ordinary shares to the public at a rate of $8.00 per share, generating total gross proceeds of US$7,000,000. This amount is before factoring in underwriting discounts and additional offering costs. SAG Holdings is known for providing a variety of high-quality OEM, third-party branded, and in-house branded replacement parts for motor vehicles and non-vehicle combustion engines.

news.headline: Bluegrass Supply Chain opens new corporate office in Bowling Green, KY with ribbon-cutting ceremony. #3PL #Kentucky
news.summary: Bluegrass Supply Chain recently marked the inauguration of its new corporate office in downtown Bowling Green, Kentucky. The celebration included a ribbon-cutting ceremony to commemorate the occasion. The company, ranked #3PL in the industry, showcased its commitment to growth and expansion with this new office location. The event was held in Bowling Green, which is known for its thriving business community.

news.headline: John L. Garrison, former CEO of Terex Corporation, joins Stanley Black & Decker Board of Directors.
news.summary: In an announcement made today in New Britain, Connecticut, Stanley Black & Decker (NYSE: SWK) revealed John L. Garrison, Jr., ex-Chairman, President, and CEO of Terex Corporation, has been appointed to its Board of Directors. With over 30 years of experience, Garrison brings significant expertise to the board.

news.headline: Software market to increase by $27.2B from 2024-2028, driven by AI innovation and rising data volumes - Technavio.
news.summary: In a recent report on the impact of AI on market dynamics, it has been projected that the Global Software Market will experience significant growth, with an estimated increase of USD 27.2 billion expected between 2024 and 2028. The market is anticipated to achieve a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.8% throughout this period.

news.headline: SiriusXM (NASDAQ: SIRI) will pay $0.27/share cash dividend on Nov 21, 2024, to stockholders of record.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, SiriusXM revealed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.27 per common stock, sanctioned by the Board of Directors. The dividend is set to be paid on November 21, 2024, to shareholders of record at that time. SiriusXM is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol SIRI.

news.headline: Grupo Rotoplas S.A.B. de C.V. reports unaudited third quarter 2024 results. Leading water solutions company in America.
news.summary: Mexico City, on October 22, 2024 - Grupo Rotoplas S.A.B. de C.V. (BMV: AGUA*) ("Rotoplas"), the top water solutions provider in the Americas, has released its unaudited financial results for the third quarter of 2024. The report, following International standards, showcases the company's performance in this period.

news.headline: JAK inhibitors for immune-mediated diseases see growing interest with 50+ companies in the pipeline.
news.summary: JAK inhibitors, a type of medication, function by inhibiting Janus kinases (JAKs), enzymes crucial in signaling pathways of multiple cytokines and growth factors. These inhibitors provide a focused method for treating immune-related illnesses in contrast to conventional treatments.

news.headline: O2Gold reveals C$1.5M non-brokered private financing round.
Coyote Outdoor Living introduces the Hybrid Multi-Fuel Pizza Oven for the 2024 holiday season, perfect for cooking enthusiasts.
news.summary: In anticipation of the upcoming 2024 holiday season, Coyote Outdoor Living introduces the ideal gift for outdoor cooking enthusiasts: the Coyote Hybrid Multi-Fuel Pizza Oven. This innovative product is set to be a must-have for food lovers and entertainers. Enjoy versatile cooking options with this unique pizza oven, setting it apart as a standout choice for those passionate about outdoor cooking.

The market is anticipated to achieve a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 9.4% during this forecast period. This growth is attributed to factors such as...

news.summary: On October 22, 2024, a report was released assessing the impact of Artificial Intelligence on market trends. According to Technavio, the Global Punching Machine Market is projected to increase by USD 333.4 million between 2024 and 2028. During this period, the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.2%.

news.headline: Radisson completes 1st closing of private placement.
Katahdin Bankshares Corp. reports Q3 2024 earnings of $2.27 million, or $0.71 per share, up from previous quarter.
news.summary: In Houlton, Maine, on October 22, 2024, Katahdin Bankshares Corp. (OTCQX: KTHN), the holding company of Katahdin Trust Company, a well-established community bank in Maine established in 1918, reported third-quarter profits for 2024 totaling $2.27 million, equivalent to $0.71 per common share. This marks a notable increase in their earnings compared to previous quarters.

news.headline: Dr. Timothy Liesching appointed as BMG's new VP and CMO on Oct. 14, moving from Lahey Hospital & Medical Center.
news.summary: In Clearwater, Florida, on October 22, 2024, Dr. Timothy Liesching assumed the role of vice president and chief medical officer (CMO) at BayCare Medical Group (BMG) on October 14. Previously, Dr. Liesching served at Lahey Hospital & Medical Center in Burlington, Massachusetts - an academic tertiary institution.

news.headline: AEP raises quarterly dividend to 93 cents per share, up by 5 cents. Payable on Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, on October 22, 2024, the Board of Directors of American Electric Power Co. (Nasdaq: AEP) announced a rise in the regular quarterly cash dividend to 93 cents per share on the common stock, marking an increase of 5 cents per share. The dividend is set to be paid out on December 10, 2024, to...

news.headline: DNS Tools Market to surge by $2.06B from 2024-2028, driven by AI trends - Technavio. CAGR over 12.11%.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that AI is significantly reshaping the market scenario. As per Technavio's assessment, the Global Domain Name System Tools Market is projected to witness a substantial expansion, with an estimated increase of USD 2.06 billion anticipated between 2024 and 2028. The market's growth is expected to maintain a robust pace, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) exceeding 12.11% throughout this period.

news.headline: India's wine market set to increase by $1.89 billion from 2024-2028, driven by online sales and AI innovation - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology predicts significant growth in the Wine Market in India, with an estimated increase of USD 1.89 billion expected between 2024 and 2028. The market is projected to experience a remarkable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 47.6% during this period. This growth is attributed to various factors driving increased consumption and demand in the region.

news.headline: Starbucks Corp (NASDAQ: SBUX) reports 3% revenue decline, 7% sales drop, 25% earnings reduction. Suspends guidance for 2025.
news.summary: After reporting weak preliminary results, Starbucks Corp (NASDAQ:SBUX) saw its shares dip in Tuesday's after-hours trading. The coffee chain expects a 3% decline in consolidated net revenues and a 7% drop in global comparable sales for the fourth quarter. Earnings are projected at 80 cents per share, marking a 25% decrease year-over-year. Due to CEO transition and business challenges, the company has suspended guidance for fiscal year 2025. Analysts had anticipated earnings of $1.03 per share and revenue of $9.375 billion. This move allows for a thorough business assessment and strategy development. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Enphase CEO: California Market Stabilized
Portable Analytical Instrument Market expected to grow by $3.07 Billion from 2024-2028, driven by generic drugs demand and AI.
news.summary: In a recent report analyzing the influence of artificial intelligence on market dynamics, it has been projected that the Global Portable Analytical Instrument Market will see significant expansion, with an estimated increase of USD 3.07 billion between 2024 and 2028. The forecast, provided by Technavio, suggests a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.8% during this period.

news.headline: Both parties agree on passing crypto laws soon. Bipartisan hope for legislation approval by year's end. #crypto #bipartisan
news.summary: Lawmakers from both the Republican and Democratic parties in the House and Senate are becoming more certain that various important cryptocurrency bills could be passed in the near future.

news.headline: Mexico City's Handshake Speakeasy tops The World's 50 Best Bars 2024 list, with 16 new entries, 28 cities, and notable awards.
news.summary: Handshake Speakeasy in Mexico City has been named The World's Best Bar, making it the first bar in Mexico to achieve this honor. The 2024 list highlights bars from 28 cities, with 16 new establishments included. Monica Berg has been voted as the Roku Industry Icon. The Cat Bite Club in Singapore has been awarded the Campari One To Watch Award. The renowned Ketel One brand is also part of the latest updates in the industry.

CVG to discuss Q3 2024 results in earnings call on Nov 5 at 8:30am ET; press release and presentation to precede call.
news.summary: CVG, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CVGI, based in New Albany, Ohio, is set to conduct its quarterly conference call on November 5, 2024, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The call aims to review the financial performance of the third quarter of 2024. Before the conference call, CVG plans to release a press statement along with a presentation. This announcement highlights the company's commitment to transparency and open communication with stakeholders regarding its financial health and strategies.

news.headline: SHVO hosts TED AI conference at Transamerica Pyramid Center. Conference runs Oct 22-23, attended by industry leaders.
news.summary: Luxury real estate developer SHVO hosted TED AI San Francisco, the top AI conference, at the newly revamped Transamerica Pyramid Center in collaboration with Foster + Partners. The event, on October 22-23, brought together industry leaders and innovators using AI to make a global impact. SHVO's Chairman and CEO, Michael Shvo, welcomed attendees to the prestigious gathering.

news.headline: Hysterometers market to grow by $0.01M from 2024-2028 due to rising gynecological diseases. AI impacting market trends.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the impact of AI on market trends. The Global Hysterometers Market is projected to increase by USD 0.01 million between 2024 and 2028, with an expected growth rate of 4.5% annually. This data comes from Technavio and indicates significant changes in the market landscape due to artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Investor alert: Rosen Law Firm investigates Light & Wonder, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNW) for potential violations of federal securities laws. Contact RLF if you suffered losses.
news.summary: On October 22, 2024, the Rosen Law Firm, an international investor rights law firm, disclosed their inquiry into Light & Wonder, Inc. (NASDAQ: LNW) for potential breaches of federal securities regulations. Investors who bought Light & Wonder securities could possibly be eligible for compensation.

news.headline: 50 sick, 1 dead from E. Coli in McDonald’s Quarter Pounders per CDC. Bacteria linked to burger ingredient.
news.summary: The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) reported that close to 50 individuals have fallen ill, with one fatality, due to a lethal bacteria linked to an ingredient in a burger item served by a popular fast food chain.

news.headline: Community health workers rally at South Riverdale Community Health Centre in Toronto to combat severe underfunding and understaffing crisis, demanding real wage increase after 8 months negotiation. Stressful conditions persist for staff at the centre.
news.summary: In Toronto today, community health care workers at the South Riverdale Community Health Centre (SRCHC) are rallying to address severe underfunding and understaffing issues at the facility. After over eight months of negotiations, SRCHC management has not provided CUPE Local 5399 members with a substantial wage increase. These workers have faced high stress levels due to challenging work conditions for years. The demand for improvement comes as they seek better support amidst the ongoing crisis.

news.headline: EnLink Midstream (NYSE: ENLC) to release Q3 earnings on Nov 6, 2024 after market close. Investors can access presentation on Investors.EnLink.com.
news.summary: EnLink Midstream, LLC (NYSE: ENLC) based in Dallas revealed that it is set to release its third-quarter earnings report and conduct an investor presentation on its official website at Investors.EnLink.com following the market closure on Wednesday, November 6, 2024. This update comes as part of its ongoing financial disclosures and aims to provide stakeholders and the investment community with insights into the company's performance for the quarter. It signifies a crucial event for EnLink as it continues to navigate the market landscape.

news.headline: Quantum Control and CORRIDOR launch SalesEdge Quoting & AI Solutions Suite for aviation ERP, aiming to streamline quoting processes.
news.summary: In MERRIMACK, N.H., CAMP Systems’ subsidiary companies, Quantum Control and CORRIDOR, renowned for their expertise in aviation ERP and workflow automation, have introduced SalesEdge Quoting and unveiled the beta edition of an AI-Based Automated Parts Pricing Tool, marking the debut of their AI Solutions Suite. These cutting-edge tools are set to transform the way aviation parts vendors handle quoting procedures and price their stock, aiming to tackle significant inefficiencies that frequently impede operations in the industry.

news.headline: Origin Bancorp (NYSE:OBK) to release quarterly earnings on 2024-10-23, expected EPS $0.66. Investors await surpassing estimates.
news.summary: Origin Bancorp, listed on NYSE as OBK, is set to unveil its quarterly earnings on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. Analysts are projecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.66 for the company. The upcoming announcement is highly awaited by investors, who are hoping for results that exceed expectations and positive guidance for the subsequent quarter.

news.headline: NETGEAR granted equity awards on Oct 15, 2024, including to new President & GM, Pramod Badjate, in accordance with Nasdaq rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: SAN JOSE, Calif.-- NETGEAR, Inc. revealed the granting of equity awards on October 15, 2024, to the recently appointed President and General Manager, Pramod Badjate, for the NETGEAR for Business (NFB) segment, along with other newly recruited employees across various business units within the organization. This announcement aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). NTGR (Nasdaq) is known for its innovative networking solutions catering to businesses, homes, and service providers globally.

news.headline: Brookline Bancorp (NASDAQ:BRKL) to report EPS of $0.20 in upcoming earnings release. Investors hopeful for positive news.
news.summary: Brookline Bancorp (NASDAQ:BRKL) is set to disclose its quarterly financial results on Wednesday, October 23, 2024. Analysts are projecting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.20 for the period. Anticipation is high in the market as stakeholders look for potential beats on estimates and positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. Investors should stay attentive to the company's performance following the announcement.
